content.en:
The years passed.

Ye Tian condensed one immeasurable bone after another, and he was condensing and refining the immeasurable bone with all his might, just to condense all the three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones as soon as possible, and then quench it to the limit.

It can be said that at this time, everyone is in a hurry, and it depends on who will take the lead to walk to the 600th stone step and successfully enter the seventh layer of the ruins stone tower.

Three hundred and ten immeasurable bones!

Three hundred and twenty immeasurable bones!

Three hundred and thirty immeasurable bones!

......

Ye Tian is getting closer and closer to condensing three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones, and the resources he consumes are also increasing, but he can still support it.

However, the resources he obtained from trading were eventually supported until he broke through to the third stage, after all, he naturally wasted a lot of resources in order to cultivate quickly.

Coupled with the fact that every immeasurable bone is tempered to the limit, the resources spent are naturally unimaginable.

this day.

The Star Sea Ancestor and the Ghost Shadow Ancestor once again entered the sixth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower.

"It seems that their power cultivation has ended!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He was also very curious if these Great Ancestors could directly walk to the sixth-hundredth stone steps on the sixth floor of the Ruins Stone Tower.

I saw that the Star Sea Great Ancestor and the Ghost Shadow Great Ancestor kept advancing, walking one stone step after another, and in a short time, they reached the five hundred and ninety-ninth stone steps, and they were only the last stone step away from the six hundred stone steps.

However, no matter how hard they tried, this stone staircase did not cross the past.

So, these great ancestors sat cross-legged here, bearing the tempering of the inexplicable power of the sixth layer of the Ruins Stone Tower.

......

"It seems that the Star Sea Great Ancestor still hasn't taken the last step!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, they are only a little short of crossing the last step, and if they continue to practice here for a while, there is still hope to break the shackles.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry or impatient, he was still practicing very indifferently.

Even if he couldn't step into the six hundred stone steps first, it would be nothing, and he didn't have much desire anyway.

For him, this time entering the Ruins Stone Tower to obtain the Infinite Diagram Inheritance and create the Taihao Infinite Body, this is already the biggest opportunity.

If you can get more benefits by entering the seventh, eighth, and ninth layers, it will naturally be great, but there is no need to be the first to enter.

After another period of time, suddenly a whirlpool appeared on the stone steps of the fifth hundred and ninety-ninth stone of the sixth layer of the ruins stone tower, and in the whirlpool was an immeasurable will condensed to the extreme.

Suddenly, the eyes of one Great Ancestor after another were attracted to the past.

"It's him!"

Many Great Ancestors recognized it, and it was the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor who produced such visions.

The Extreme Yang Great Ancestor was a high-level immeasurable lifeform that was the number one on the Xuanqi Realm's Immeasurable Blood List, and his strength was even stronger than that of the Star Sea Great Ancestor, otherwise he would not be ranked first on the Immeasurable Blood List.

And he is also a member of the Jiuyang Sea in the current Xuanqi Territory, with a deep background.

The strength of Jiuyang Sea is even stronger than that of the Xuanqi Pavilion after the decline, which is enough to rank among the top three forces in the Xuanqi Territory, and it has more than a dozen relics, which is not comparable to the Xuanqi Pavilion at all.

Now, with the help of Jiuyang Sea, the Great Ancestor of the Extreme Yang has improved the immeasurable will, and under the tempering of the sixth layer of the power of the Ruins Stone Tower, he has finally broken the shackles of the immeasurable will.

"The Extreme Yang Great Ancestor is going to condense the Infinite Will Lake!"

A Great Ancestor exclaimed.

Condensing the Lake of Immeasurable Will was something that many third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms dreamed of, but it was too difficult, so they gave up and did not pursue the promotion of Immeasurable Will.

Therefore, it had been a long time since the Xuanqi Realm had given birth to a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform that had condensed the Infinite Will Lake.

For many Great Ancestors, it was the first time they had seen a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform condense the Immeasurable Will Lake.

Similarly, Ye Tian was also the first time.

"This is the Lake of Infinite Will!"

Ye Tian could feel that the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor's immeasurable will was undergoing an unimaginable transformation, and the immeasurable will was evolving towards a higher level.

Once the transformation is over, the immeasurable will of the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor will far surpass that of the present.

"Damn, this guy was the first to break through!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor was not convinced.

He has always been suppressed by the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor, and many Great Ancestors also like to compare him with the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor, after all, they all belong to the Great Ancestor of the same era, and they are both on the immeasurable blood list.

It's a pity that he has never surpassed the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor.

I thought that there was hope to surpass the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor this time, but I didn't expect that the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor would enter the ruins stone tower after entering the Great Ancestor, but he would take the lead in condensing the Infinite Will Lake, and he was about to step into the six hundred stone steps.

Rumble!!!!

The Extreme Yang Great Ancestor's immeasurable will slowly ended, forming a lake of immeasurable will somewhere in his body, and his own immeasurable extreme dao domain also underwent a transformation, and his power skyrocketed.

At this moment, the strength of the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor increased again.

Immediately, the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor stepped into the six-hundredth stone steps.

At this time, the Ruined Stone Pagoda gave the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor a benefit.

Airplanes!!!

A black flower emerged and landed on the hands of the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor.

"Black Sun Nine Spirit Flower!"

The Great Ancestor of the Sea of Stars was jealous, this was the treasure he had always dreamed of!

A third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform like him has condensed 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood, and the next step is to use immeasurable blood to quench the whole body, a process involving tendons, acupoints, internal organs, brains, and so on.

However, it is necessary to successfully temper all of them before it can be considered a real breakthrough, and this process is very difficult, and if you rely on yourself, you may not succeed countless times.

And the Black Sun Nine Spirit Flower is one of the very few treasures that can help increase the success rate of the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, which can increase the chance by two percent.

In addition, he also collected a small amount of Void Gold Water, which could also increase the chance by one or two percent.

Coupled with other treasures, then his hope of breaking through was greatly increased.

When the time comes, he will dare to attack the fourth stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeform!

After the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor received this Black Yang Nine Spirit Flower, he was directly teleported to the seventh layer of the Ruins Stone Tower.

"Maybe I can get such a treasure too!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor thought to himself.

Therefore, he strives to break through as soon as possible and condense the immeasurable will lake.

The other side.

Ye Tian's copy body was finally about to completely condense the three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones!

Once it is successfully condensed, and then this last immeasurable bone is tempered to the extreme, you can try to break through the third stage.
